title: Biome Creeper
description: A small client-side mod to make the Creeper's texture change according to the biome they're in.
body: # Biome Creeper A small mod to make the Creeper's texture change according to the biome they're in. ## Showcase If installed only on the **client**, Creepers will change their textures dynamically depending on what biome they're on. If installed on the **server**, Creepers will keep their texture according to the biome they spawned on. (Can be changed on the config) ## Resource Pack Support The mod dynamically changes the colors in the Creeper's texture, to the current biome's foliage hue. Any resource packs should work. ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: [https://github.com/lucaargolo/biome-creeper](https://github.com/lucaargolo/biome-creeper) If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
